description: ILMA Runtime Wiring Contract — mandatory flow for heavy tasks

flow_sequence.name: owner_command
flow_sequence.function_role: Receives and validates owner command. Establishes mission context and owner intent.
must_do: Parse raw command into structured format
must_not_do: Proceed if forbidden scope detected without confirmation
Bypass safety contract for any reason
flow_sequence.failure_action: Request owner confirmation if forbidden scope detected, otherwise abort
flow_sequence.implementation_notes: ilma_bootstrap.sh and ilma.py provide command interface. Formal command parser with structured output not fully implemented.

flow_sequence.name: command_parser
flow_sequence.function_role: Parses structured command into execution plan with scope, focus, and constraints.
flow_sequence.failure_action: Use conservative defaults, flag for review
flow_sequence.implementation_notes: AutoLearningTriggerParser exists but only handles 'auto learning' commands. General command parser for all heavy tasks not unified.

flow_sequence.name: task_classifier
flow_sequence.function_role: Classifies user intent into task class (code/write/research/audit/plan/internal/multi/artifact/simple/unsafe) with confidence score.
must_do: Calculate confidence based on match quality
must_not_do: Classify based on partial word matches
flow_sequence.failure_action: Default to PLAN task class with low confidence
flow_sequence.implementation_notes: RuntimeRouter.classify_intent() is functional. 10 task classes defined. Compound pattern detection implemented.

flow_sequence.name: runtime_router
flow_sequence.function_role: Routes task to appropriate workflow, capabilities, tools, and skills based on task classification.
flow_sequence.failure_action: Escalate to owner if routing fails critically
flow_sequence.implementation_notes: RuntimeRouter.route() functional. Uses body_map and routing_matrix for resolution. Safety class determination implemented.

flow_sequence.name: pretask_lesson_retrieval
flow_sequence.function_role: Retrieves relevant lessons from memory before task execution to inform actor.
must_not_do: Filter by task_class incorrectly (excludes seeded lessons)
Skip lesson context injection when lessons available
flow_sequence.failure_action: Continue without lessons, log retrieval failure
flow_sequence.implementation_notes: PreTaskLearningHook and LessonMemory exist. retrieve_for_task() returns dict with 'lessons' key. Integration into main flow via ilma_task_entrypoint.py Step 1.

flow_sequence.name: tool_skill_selector
flow_sequence.function_role: Selects appropriate tools and skills based on routing decision and capability matrix.
must_do: Build fallback chain for tool failures
must_not_do: Return empty tool list for non-simple tasks
flow_sequence.failure_action: Use default tool set, flag for review
flow_sequence.implementation_notes: Capability resolution exists in RuntimeRouter.route(). Direct tool/skill selector not formalized as separate component. Integration via routing_matrix.

flow_sequence.name: actor_execution
flow_sequence.function_role: Executes the task using Actor-Critic loop with artifact production.
must_do: Produce valid artifact based on target
must_not_do: Produce artifact without lesson context when lessons available
Skip artifact production for non-trivial tasks
flow_sequence.failure_action: Trigger reflection loop, increment revision count
flow_sequence.implementation_notes: run_task_with_evolution() is primary entrypoint. Uses DefaultArtifactProducer for actual artifact creation. Actor-Critic loop in AutonomousEvolutionOrchestrator.

flow_sequence.name: judge_evaluation
flow_sequence.function_role: Evaluates actor output against judge rubric and criteria.
flow_sequence.failure_action: If evaluation fails, use conservative verdict (FAIL)
flow_sequence.implementation_notes: CriticJudge class in ilma_critic_judge.py. verify_file() in ilma_judge_system.py for code verification. Judge verdict determines next action.

flow_sequence.name: reflexion
flow_sequence.function_role: Self-correction cycle when judge returns FAIL. Triggers revision with critique injection.
must_do: Check if revision needed based on verdict
must_not_do: Skip reflexion when verdict is FAIL
flow_sequence.failure_action: If reflexion fails, proceed with current output and flag for review
flow_sequence.implementation_notes: ReflectionEngine exists. ReflexionLoop in ilma_gemini_integration.py. Triggered when judge verdict is FAIL. Max revision cycles enforced.

flow_sequence.name: evidence_update
flow_sequence.function_role: Updates evidence ledger with execution results, artifacts, and verification data.
must_not_do: Skip evidence logging for verified capabilities
flow_sequence.failure_action: Log warning, continue without evidence update
flow_sequence.implementation_notes: log_evidence() function exists in ilma_unified_core.py. Evidence service moved to scripts/services/evidence/. Formal evidence update pipeline not fully integrated into runtime flow.

flow_sequence.name: mark_reused
flow_sequence.function_role: Marks retrieved lessons as reused, incrementing reuse_count and updating last_reused_at.
flow_sequence.implementation_notes: mark_reused() method exists in LessonMemory class. Tests confirm it increments reuse_count and sets reused_at. Integration in test_phase48e_lesson_retrieval.py verified.

flow_sequence.name: trace_export
flow_sequence.function_role: Exports complete evolution trace to filesystem for audit and reproducibility.
must_do: Include all iterations, lessons, judge results
flow_sequence.failure_action: Log warning, continue without trace export
flow_sequence.implementation_notes: EvolutionTrace.to_json() method exists. Traces exported to evidence/evolution_traces/. Phase 50 trace exists at evidence/evolution_traces/phase50/final_trace.json.

flow_sequence.name: checkpoint
flow_sequence.function_role: Creates durable checkpoint for long-running tasks to enable resume.
flow_sequence.failure_action: Log warning, continue without checkpoint (may lose progress)
flow_sequence.implementation_notes: MemoryPersistence class exists with checkpoint() method. Checkpoint directory at memory/checkpoints/. Triggered automatically every N entries or on request.

flow_sequence.name: final_report
flow_sequence.function_role: Generates comprehensive final report of mission execution.
flow_sequence.failure_action: Generate minimal report with available data
flow_sequence.implementation_notes: Final report generation NOT formally implemented as a separate step. Phase 50 scripts produce informal reports. Formal final_report step needs implementation.

flow_sequence.name: claim_boundary_audit
flow_sequence.function_role: Audits claims against evidence and updates claim boundary status.
must_not_do: Overclaim capability based on partial evidence
flow_sequence.failure_action: Halt overclaim, require evidence before proceeding
flow_sequence.implementation_notes: ilma_claim_boundary.json exists with what_ilma_can_claim and what_ilma_cannot_claim_yet. Grounding loop in ilma_grounding_loop.py has auto_classify_claim(). Formal audit mechanism at mission end not implemented.

1_to_2.validation: structured_command must have command_type and scope

6_to_7.validation: selected_tools must not be empty for non-simple tasks

8_to_10.validation: verdict must be final (no more revisions)

stop.description: Halt execution immediately, do not proceed to next step
stop.action: Log error, notify owner, do not produce artifact

continue.description: Continue with conservative defaults, flag for review
continue.action: Log warning, use fallback, proceed with reduced confidence

escalate.action: Log critical, trigger reflexion loop or owner alert

graceful_degradation.description: When a step fails or is missing, the runtime should continue with reduced functionality
rules: If pretask_lesson_retrieval fails, continue without lessons
If tool_skill_selector returns empty, use default tool set
If reflexion fails, use current output and flag for review
If evidence_update fails, log warning and continue
If mark_reused fails, log warning and continue
If trace_export fails, continue without trace (audit gap)
If checkpoint fails, log warning (may lose progress)
If final_report fails, generate minimal report with available data
If claim_boundary_audit fails, halt any overclaim

conditional_steps.reflexion: Only if judge verdict is FAIL and revision_needed is true
conditional_steps.mark_reused: Only if lessons were retrieved in step 5

not_integrated: command_parser - exists but only for auto_learning commands
tool_skill_selector - exists but not as separate component
final_report - not formally implemented as a step
integration_gaps: pretask_lesson_retrieval not auto-triggered in all heavy tasks
evidence_update not formally integrated in runtime flow
claim_boundary_audit not called at mission end
